posts.author: Run2Catchwind (Lin Ma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Once I created a mass outgoing email, i can only view it, I cannot edit anything. If I found a mistake, I have to delete the whole scheduled group and create a new one.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to edit the content and sending time after a mass email is scheduled before it went out.
